title: THEATRE Innovation Innovation / CV Pipeline Structural heart devices: what's new and how it reaches your cathlab
learningObjectives: To discover the latest structural heart device innovations, from new TAVR platforms and leaflet modification to next-genmitral/tricuspidtechnologies and closure devices, and assess their clinical readiness

To understand how a structural heart device travels from concept to your cath lab: the innovation pathway through prototyping, first-in-human studies, regulatory clearance (FDA Breakthrough, EU MDR), and market adoption

To learn from physician-innovators who have lived the journey, what drives success, what kills promising devices, and how you can engage with the innovation ecosystem as inventor, investigator, or early adopter
